rag_rules: Use assume/guarantee labels and eq/const declarations for AGREE syntax
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations
Use nested if-then-else for branching logic
Use AGREE logical operators for contract logic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq declarations for output range guarantees
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names as AGREE variables
Do not invent declarations for unresolved identifiers
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope
